title: fragaria vesca var. ananassa
intro: Fragaria vesca var. ananassa, also known as the wild strawberry or Alpine strawberry, is a deciduous perennial plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant's leaves, flowers, and fruits have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. ananassa include reducing inflammation, improving heart health, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements. Fragaria vesca var. ananassa can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in different ways.
